category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Brazil market access, INMETRO compulsory certification, and minimum efficiency requirements under Lei 10.295/2001.

title.en: China-to-Brazil Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入巴西：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入巴西：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Brazilian INMETRO compulsory certification, Lei 10.295/2001 minimum efficiency (IR3/premium), ABNT NBR 17094 safety, and import duty requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与巴西 INMETRO 强制认证、Lei 10.295/2001 最低能效（IR3/高效）、ABNT NBR 17094 安全及进口关税要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與巴西 INMETRO 強制認證、Lei 10.295/2001 最低能效（IR3/高效）、ABNT NBR 17094 安全及進口關稅要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INMETRO conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Brazilian INMETRO, ABNT, SISCOMEX, ANVISA, and national market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INMETRO 合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行巴西 INMETRO、ABNT、SISCOMEX、ANVISA 及市场监管要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INMETRO 合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行巴西 INMETRO、ABNT、SISCOMEX、ANVISA 及市場監管要求。

answer_first.en: INMETRO compulsory certification and Lei 10.295/2001 premium efficiency (IR3) are the primary gaps; Chinese motors must obtain an INMETRO conformity mark and meet ABNT NBR 17094 safety requirements before Brazilian market entry.
answer_first.zh: INMETRO 强制认证及 Lei 10.295/2001 高效要求（IR3）是主要差距；中国电机进入巴西市场前须取得 INMETRO 合格标志并满足 ABNT NBR 17094 安全要求。
answer_first.zht: INMETRO 強制認證及 Lei 10.295/2001 高效要求（IR3）是主要差距；中國電機進入巴西市場前須取得 INMETRO 合格標誌並滿足 ABNT NBR 17094 安全要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, market-surveillance, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
